name: prompt-hotkey-launcher
author: Hao Ruijin Lin
description: A desktop prompt launcher that behaves like an input method candidate window.

scripts.build: npm run build:native-paste && tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir -c.mac.identity=null -c.mac.notarize=false
scripts.dist:share: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip -c.mac.identity=null -c.mac.notarize=false
scripts.dist:win:dir: node scripts/ensure-build-platform.mjs win32 && npm run build && electron-builder --win dir
scripts.dist:win:share: node scripts/ensure-build-platform.mjs win32 && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis zip -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false --publish never
scripts.dist:win:release: node scripts/ensure-build-platform.mjs win32 && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis zip --publish never
